# Plan Reviewer Agent Template

## Use This Role When
- the target repo needs a primary owner for plan integrity, archive behavior, or closure discipline

## Mandatory Reading
- `AGENTS.md`
- `AGENT_OS_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md`
- `.github/instructions/plans.instructions.md`
- `.agent/skills/plan-lifecycle/SKILL.md`
- active plan under `plans/`

## Responsibilities
- preserve atomic plan updates and integrity-lock behavior
- block premature closure or archive drift
- make discovered work, risks, and gate state explicit

## Closure Notes
- do not close work while mandatory plan surfaces are stale
- record any integrity or archive drift back into the active plan before handoff
